memoryArtifacts.headline: Coat of Arms of Wingfield of Letheringham
memoryArtifacts.description:
Description from the General Armory of England, Scotland, Ireland and Wales, 1884

Arms: Argent on a Bend Gules cotised Sable 3 Pairs of Wings conjoined in Lure of the Field.

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wingfield於1345年出生在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆時，他的父親Thomas Wingfield25歲，母親Margaret Bovile17歲。他於大約1368年與Margaret Hastings在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1389年在他的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wingfield于1345年出生在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆时，他的父亲Thomas Wingfield25岁，母亲Margaret Bovile17岁。他于大约1368年与Margaret Hastings在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1389年在他的家乡享年44岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Wingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Winfield
meanings: English: habitational name from Wingfield in Derbyshire, Bedfordshire, Suffolk, and Wiltshire. The Derbyshire placename probably derives from Old English winn ‘pasture, meadow’ + feld ‘open country’. The Bedfordshire placename may derive from Old English wince ‘nook, corner’ + feld. The Suffolk placename may derive from the Old English personal name Wiga + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) or Old English wīg ‘idol’ + feld. The Wiltshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Wina + Old English feld.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wingfield was born in 1345, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Wingfield, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Bovile, was 17. He married Margaret Hastings about 1368, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1389, in his hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in Letheringham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wingfield est né en 1345, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Wingfield, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bovile, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Hastings environ 1368, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1389, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wingfield 1345 in Letheringham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Wingfield 25 und seine Mutter Margaret Bovile 17. Er hat um 1368 in Letheringham, Suffolk, England Margaret Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1389 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Letheringham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wingfield è nato il nel 1345 nel Letheringham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Wingfield, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Bovile, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Hastings circa 1368, nel Letheringham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1389, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Letheringham, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wingfieldが1345年にイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムで生まれた時，父Thomas Wingfieldは25歳，母Margaret Bovileは17歳であった。約1368年にイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムでMargaret Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1389年に故郷で44歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクレスエリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wingfield(이)가 1345년 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Wingfield(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Bovile(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1368년 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에서 Margaret Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1389년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wingfield nasceu em 1345, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Wingfield, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bovile, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Hastings aproximadamente 1368, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1389, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wingfield родился в 1345 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Wingfield было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bovile, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Hastings около 1368 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1389 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Wingfield nació en 1345, en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Wingfield, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Bovile, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Margaret Hastings aproximadamente 1368, en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1389, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
